name: claw-scripts
description: CLAW system scripts — hooks, session processor, wiki sync, heartbeat report, and utilities.

notes.puppeteer-core: Only needed for gsc-submit (runs against a user-launched Chrome). Safe to remove if you don't use the GSC automation.
notes.all-other-scripts: Use only Node built-ins (fs, path, os, crypto, child_process) + global fetch (Node 18+). No install needed for those.
